grades.expectation: Response identifies this as requiring enhanced due diligence (EDD)
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 'enhanced due diligence (EDD)' and dedicates section 4 to EDD requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions source country risk assessment or FATF status
grades.reason: Section 1 specifically covers 'source-country risk assessment (UAE-specific)' and explicitly mentions checking 'FATF status'

grades.expectation: Response requires SWIFT/wire transfer confirmations or equivalent transfer evidence
grades.reason: Section 2 explicitly requires 'SWIFT/MT103 (or equivalent wire confirmation)' with detailed specifications
Section 3 is dedicated to 'Evidence of FX conversion' and specifies 'FX contract note / bank conversion advice'

grades.expectation: Response mentions suspicious activity report (SAR) obligation if concerns arise
grades.reason: Section 7 explicitly mentions escalating to MLRO for 'SAR' consideration and 'DAML' request
